- Node 8: color=b, pixels=16, boundary=[[20, 18], [20, 21], [23, 21], [23, 18]] - blue square at (20, 18)-(23, 21) - unchanged

Let me think about what the blue click does. Previously, the blue click swapped the blue square with the checkerboard. Let me see if there's a pattern.
